product_brief.target_audience: 18-30 young TikTok users who like streetwear and affordable outfits
core_selling_points: easy to match with jeans and cargo pants
ai_generation_constraints: keep logo and front print stable
use simple body movement and stable camera path
avoid hand-object interactions that require precise physics
keep product visible in the first 2 seconds
product_brief.content_angle: TikTok conversion short video for product card click-through

market_strategy.audience_motivation: wants affordable style, easy matching, and social-media-ready outfits
hook_strategy: show product clearly within first 1.5 seconds
open with a movement or visual contrast instead of abstract slogan
use one main selling point per shot
cta_strategy: repeat product name at ending frame
risk_notes: avoid showing unavailable price or logistics promises

15s.hook: Stop scrolling — see why POV Oversized T-shirt fits daily TikTok shopping.

shot_plan.content: Hero shot of POV Oversized T-shirt entering frame with fast camera push-in

Realistic usage or wearing scene with simple movement
Side angle detail, keep product centered and stable
Before/after or match-with scenario

optimization_suggestions: Put the strongest visible selling point in the first 2 seconds.
